scripts.install:all: npm install && cd client && npm install && cd ../microservices/gateway && npm install && cd ../auth-service && npm install && cd ../lead-service && npm install && cd ../notification-service && npm install && cd ../reporting-service && npm install
scripts.dev: node -e "console.log('Use START-MICROSERVICES.ps1 on Windows or docker-compose up locally')"
scripts.start: node -e "console.log('Root service idle. Railway should deploy sub-services via docker-compose.')"
